Title: Chrome Desktop - Full Flow

1. Run Smoke Tests (SMK-001 to SMK-012)
2. Test BOPIS flow
3. Test search functionality
4. Test checkout
5. Verify no console errors
Expected Result:
- All features work
- No visual bugs
- No JavaScript errors
